title: Intensely Jammy Moroccan Paccheri Pasta Seffa
description: A delicious, vegan-friendly Moroccan-inspired dish featuring paccheri pasta, sweet and tangy jammy vegetables, and a springy texture. Perfect for meal prep.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion, red bell pepper, and red cabbage to the skillet. Cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the pomegranate molasses, harissa, cumin, coriander, and salt to the skillet. Stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the cooked paccheri pasta to the skillet and stir to combine with the sauce.
Transfer the seffa to a serving dish and garnish with chopped parsley.
Drizzle with lemon juice and serve immediately.
Serve warm or at room temperature as a main course or side dish.
Store leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
Reheat the seffa in the microwave or oven before serving.
Serve with additional chopped parsley and lemon wedges, if desired.
